name: Apple and Cream Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix yeast, salt, 4 tablespoons sugar, and 3/4 cup flour in a bowl.
2. Add butter to milk until well combined.
3. Heat mixture until very warm (120-130°F).
4. Gradually add milk mixture to flour mixture.
5. Beat for 2 minutes.
6. Add egg and 1/2 cup flour; beat with an electric mixer on high speed for 2 minutes.
7. Mix in enough flour to form a soft dough.
8. Knead for 5 to 10 minutes until the dough is shiny and elastic.
9. Place in a greased bowl and let rise for 1 hour or until doubled in bulk.
10. Pat dough into a well-greased 10-inch springform pan, pressing it up the sides of the pan by 1 1/2 inches.
11. Toss apples with lemon juice, cinnamon, 1/4 cup sugar, and 2 tablespoons flour; arrange in rows on top of the dough.
12. Beat together cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, and egg; spread over apples.
13. Let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
14. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Best when served warm.
